prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 56.5 kg; Height 151.9 cm; BMI 24.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.2%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 9.9%), FPG (12 months ago 247mg/dL; 9 months ago 256mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 247mg/dL; current 222mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.1kg; 9 months ago 55.8kg; 6 months ago 56.1kg; 3 months ago 57.2kg; current 56.5kg), Height (12 months ago 151.9cm; 9 months ago 151.9cm; 6 months ago 151.9cm; 3 months ago 151.9cm; current 151.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 24.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 135mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 49U/L; 9 months ago 41U/L; 6 months ago 42U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 44U/L), AST (12 months ago 35U/L; 9 months ago 38U/L; 6 months ago 36U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 39U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 31mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 481mg/g; 9 months ago 534mg/g; 6 months ago 585mg/g; 3 months ago 480mg/g; current 523mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 84mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 147mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 165mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 157mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 9.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
